name: OpenHuman
proofLevel: Under review. OpenHuman docs PR is open, the SKILL.md path is documented, and a draft native OpenHuman skill branch exists in the Nipmod fork because the upstream skills repo is archived.
smokeCommand: OpenHuman agent: use Nipmod to search gitlawb-repo-reader, inspect trust and return an install plan only.
externalDependency: Tiny Humans owner review is required before claiming official OpenHuman support or publishing OpenHuman-owned packages through Nipmod.
notClaimed: OpenHuman has approved, endorsed or merged Nipmod
OpenHuman-owned skills are published through Nipmod
The draft OpenHuman native skill is merged upstream
